'''danganga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smacktalk|smacktalk]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ng-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smacktalk|smacktalk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| danganga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dængængæth|dængængæth]] || [[word:dængængæj|dængængæj]] || [[word:dængængæsh|dængængæsh]] || [[word:dængængæ|dængængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dangangangath|dangangangath]] || [[word:dangangangaj|dangangangaj]] || [[word:dangangangash|dangangangash]] || [[word:danganganga|danganganga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dangangath|dangangath]] || [[word:dangangaj|dangangaj]] || [[word:dangangash|dangangash]] || [[word:danganga|danganga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dangafngath|dangafngath]] || [[word:dangafngaj|dangafngaj]] || [[word:dangafngash|dangafngash]] || [[word:dangafngaf|dangafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dangangatha|dangangatha]] || [[word:dangangaja|dangangaja]] || [[word:dangangasha|dangangasha]] || [[word:dangangaka|dangangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dangangath|dangangath]] || [[word:dangangaj|dangangaj]] || [[word:dangangash|dangangash]] || [[word:danganga|danganga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dangangathal|dangangathal]] || [[word:dangangajal|dangangajal]] || [[word:dangangashal|dangangashal]] || [[word:dangangakal|dangangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dangangathatha|dangangathatha]] || [[word:dangangajaja|dangangajaja]] || [[word:dangangashasha|dangangashasha]] || [[word:dangangaka|dangangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dangangathan|dangangathan]] || [[word:dangangajan|dangangajan]] || [[word:dangangashan|dangangashan]] || [[word:dangangakan|dangangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dangangathaoro|dangangathaoro]] || [[word:dangangajaoro|dangangajaoro]] || [[word:dangangashaoro|dangangashaoro]] || [[word:dangangakaoro|dangangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
